## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation

## Checklist

- [ ] Tested on Redmine 5.0.x
- [ ] Tested on Redmine 5.1.x
- [ ] Tested on Redmine 6.x or compatibility considered
- [ ] Updated README/docs if needed
- [ ] Updated CHANGELOG if needed
